# Liaison.legal

Liaison.legal is a free co-parenting communication app for separated and divorced parents.

## What it is

A secure, timestamped communication platform that creates tamper-evident records of every
co-parenting message. Every message is cryptographically hashed with SHA-256 and chained to
the record before it, making the history verifiably unchanged. Read and open times are
captured automatically.

## Who it is for

- **Parents**: Free forever. No credit card. No parent payment screen exists anywhere in the
  product. Parents use secure messaging, tamper-evident logging, read receipts, document storage,
  and full communication history at no cost, for as long as they need it.

- **Attorneys and law firms**: Free view-only access to a client's verified record. Paid access
  to the AI Forensic Auditor, which cross-references the communication record against the
  uploaded court order, flags potential deviations, and assembles a court-ready Declaration of
  Non-Compliance for attorney review.

## Key facts

- Free for parents, permanently. Not a trial. No parent payment rail exists in the product.
- Records are tamper-evident: SHA-256 hashed, chained, and verifiable.
- Liaison.legal does not sell or share user data with advertisers.
- Liaison.legal is not a law firm and does not provide legal advice.
- The AI Forensic Auditor is for attorneys only — never shown to parents.

## Key pages

- Home: https://liaison.legal/
- How It Works: https://liaison.legal/how-it-works
- The Free Promise: https://liaison.legal/free
- Security & Privacy: https://liaison.legal/security
- FAQ: https://liaison.legal/faq
- For Law Firms: https://liaison.legal/firms
- Resource — Free Co-Parenting Communication Records: https://liaison.legal/resources/free-co-parenting-communication-records
